hero.role: SOC Analyst · Threat Detection · Incident Response
hero.summary: Cybersecurity profile focused on SOC operations, client-facing incident handling, internal security exposure, SIEM/SOAR workflows and endpoint telemetry. I work across hybrid environments, improving alert triage, detection logic, automation and technical reporting.
hero.availability: Open to cybersecurity roles · Ireland / UK / Spain

highlights.label: Cybersecurity operations
highlights.detail: SOC, internal IT security and operational security exposure.

highlights.label: Daily alerts
highlights.detail: Security alert triage across hybrid cloud and on-prem environments.

highlights.label: Facing SOC
highlights.detail: Incident escalation, reporting and coordination with client teams.

highlights.label: English
highlights.detail: Professional working proficiency for international teams.

about: I am a cybersecurity profile focused on SOC operations, threat detection, incident response and SIEM/SOAR optimization. My work combines operational alert triage with investigation, documentation, client communication and detection improvement.

I have worked across both sides of security operations: internal IT/security environments, including systems administration, hardening, Docker, Proxmox and infrastructure support; and client-facing SOC environments, handling alerts, incidents, escalation workflows and reporting.

My technical direction is defensive security: endpoint telemetry, log correlation, ransomware-related behaviors, SOAR workflows and practical detection engineering. I value evidence, repeatability and clear communication over generic security buzzwords.

focus.title: Client-facing SOC operations
focus.text: Alert triage, incident escalation, case documentation and coordination through tools such as Jira, ServiceNow, TheHive and IRIS.

focus.title: Internal security background
focus.text: Linux/Windows administration, system hardening, Proxmox, Docker, server configuration and internal security awareness training.

focus.title: Detection engineering mindset
focus.text: Interest in MITRE ATT&CK mapping, endpoint telemetry, Sysmon/Velociraptor-style evidence, SIEM tuning and controlled lab validation.

bullets: Monitor and triage 60–90 daily security alerts across hybrid cloud and on-prem environments using Microsoft Sentinel, Elastic, Splunk, Wazuh, FortiSIEM and CrowdStrike.
Investigate, contain and escalate incidents involving phishing, malware/ransomware, unauthorized access and suspicious endpoint activity.
Support client-facing security operations through incident reporting, ticket handling, escalation workflows and coordination with technical stakeholders.
Contribute to SIEM rule tuning, SOAR playbooks and operational documentation to reduce noise, improve detection quality and accelerate response workflows.
Support onboarding and internal knowledge sharing around Elastic/Wazuh, Microsoft Sentinel, Mimecast and operational security procedures.
Administered and hardened Linux and Windows systems in local and virtualized environments using Proxmox.
Configured physical servers, RAID architectures and Docker-based services for corporate infrastructure.
Supported internal IT/security operations, system monitoring, network support and automation of administrative tasks through scripting.
Designed and delivered internal security training on ARP spoofing, phishing and practical security awareness.
Coordinated activities and supported multicultural teams in an international environment, strengthening communication, ownership and leadership under pressure.

en.projectsIntro: Labs and projects that support my defensive security profile: detection engineering, controlled simulations, secure web development and practical cybersecurity testing.

projects.title: Velociraptor / MITRE ATT&CK Detection Lab
projects.description: Academic and personal lab focused on endpoint telemetry, controlled technique execution, MITRE ATT&CK mapping and SOC-style alerting workflows. Built around Windows telemetry, Sysmon, Velociraptor and ransomware-related behavior analysis.

projects.title: Controlled File Encryption
projects.description: Safe PowerShell workflow for controlled file encryption and decryption. Designed to simulate ransomware-style encryption behavior in a reversible lab environment for defensive testing and detection validation.

projects.title: Cybersecurity Web Platform
projects.description: Cybersecurity learning platform built with Django, React, Tailwind, JWT, 2FA and PostgreSQL, with attention to common risks such as XSS, CSRF, SQL injection and malicious file uploads.

projects.title: Security Testing Lab
projects.description: Repository of cybersecurity tests, exercises and technical practice. Used as an evidence base for hands-on learning, offensive/defensive testing and structured security experimentation.

projects.title: Security Lab IoT
projects.description: Distributed monitoring project for laboratory environments, focused on temperature and humidity control through sensors and basic security-oriented supervision.

education.title: Master’s Degree in Cybersecurity — Information and Communications Security
education.institution: Escuela Técnica Superior de Ingeniería, University of Seville

certifications.title: Microsoft SC-900: Security, Compliance, and Identity Fundamentals

contact.title: Let’s connect
contact.copy: Interested in SOC, cybersecurity analyst, detection engineering and incident response roles. Best contact channel: email or LinkedIn.

hero.role: Analista SOC · Detección de amenazas · Respuesta a incidentes

hero.availability: Abierto a roles de ciberseguridad · Irlanda / UK / España

highlights.label: Cybersecurity operations
highlights.detail: SOC, seguridad interna y exposición operativa en ciberseguridad.

highlights.label: Alertas diarias
highlights.detail: Triaje de alertas en entornos cloud y on-prem híbridos.

highlights.label: Facing SOC
highlights.detail: Escalado, reporting y coordinación con equipos cliente.

about: Soy un perfil de ciberseguridad centrado en operaciones SOC, detección de amenazas, respuesta a incidentes y optimización SIEM/SOAR. Combino triaje operativo de alertas con investigación, documentación, comunicación con cliente y mejora de detecciones.

He trabajado en ambos lados de la operación de seguridad: entornos internos de IT/seguridad, incluyendo administración de sistemas, bastionado, Docker, Proxmox e infraestructura; y entornos SOC orientados a cliente, gestionando alertas, incidentes, escalados y reporting.

Mi dirección técnica es seguridad defensiva: telemetría endpoint, correlación de logs, comportamientos asociados a ransomware, flujos SOAR y detection engineering práctico. Priorizo evidencia, repetibilidad y comunicación clara frente a buzzwords genéricas.

focus.title: SOC con trato cliente
focus.text: Triaje de alertas, escalado de incidentes, documentación de casos y coordinación mediante Jira, ServiceNow, TheHive e IRIS.

focus.title: Base en seguridad interna
focus.text: Administración Linux/Windows, bastionado, Proxmox, Docker, configuración de servidores y formación interna de concienciación.

focus.title: Mentalidad detection engineering
focus.text: Interés en MITRE ATT&CK, telemetría endpoint, evidencia tipo Sysmon/Velociraptor, tuning SIEM y validación en laboratorio.

bullets: Monitorización y triaje de 60–90 alertas de seguridad diarias en entornos híbridos cloud y on-prem con Microsoft Sentinel, Elastic, Splunk, Wazuh, FortiSIEM y CrowdStrike.
Investigación, contención y escalado de incidentes de phishing, malware/ransomware, accesos no autorizados y actividad sospechosa en endpoint.
Soporte a operaciones SOC orientadas a cliente mediante reporting de incidentes, gestión de tickets, flujos de escalado y coordinación con equipos técnicos.
Contribución al ajuste de reglas SIEM, playbooks SOAR y documentación operativa para reducir ruido, mejorar la detección y acelerar flujos de respuesta.
Apoyo en onboarding y transferencia de conocimiento interno sobre Elastic/Wazuh, Microsoft Sentinel, Mimecast y procedimientos operativos.
Administración y bastionado de sistemas Linux y Windows en entornos locales y virtualizados con Proxmox.
Configuración de servidores físicos, arquitecturas RAID y servicios Docker para infraestructura corporativa.
Soporte a operaciones internas de IT/seguridad, monitorización de sistemas y redes, y automatización de tareas administrativas mediante scripting.
Diseño e impartición de formaciones internas sobre ARP spoofing, phishing y buenas prácticas de seguridad.
Coordinación de actividades y apoyo a equipos multiculturales en un entorno internacional, reforzando comunicación, responsabilidad y liderazgo bajo presión.

es.projectsIntro: Laboratorios y proyectos que refuerzan mi perfil defensivo: detection engineering, simulaciones controladas, desarrollo web seguro y práctica técnica en ciberseguridad.

projects.title: Velociraptor / MITRE ATT&CK Detection Lab
projects.description: Laboratorio académico y personal centrado en telemetría endpoint, ejecución controlada de técnicas, mapeo MITRE ATT&CK y flujos de alerta tipo SOC. Basado en Windows telemetry, Sysmon, Velociraptor y análisis de comportamiento asociado a ransomware.

projects.title: Controlled File Encryption
projects.description: Flujo seguro en PowerShell para cifrado y descifrado controlado de archivos. Diseñado para simular comportamiento tipo ransomware de forma reversible en laboratorio para pruebas defensivas y validación de detecciones.

projects.title: Cybersecurity Web Platform
projects.description: Plataforma de aprendizaje de ciberseguridad construida con Django, React, Tailwind, JWT, 2FA y PostgreSQL, con atención a riesgos comunes como XSS, CSRF, SQL injection y subida de archivos maliciosos.

projects.title: Security Testing Lab
projects.description: Repositorio de pruebas, ejercicios y práctica técnica en ciberseguridad. Funciona como base de evidencia para aprendizaje hands-on, pruebas ofensivas/defensivas y experimentación estructurada.

projects.title: Security Lab IoT
projects.description: Proyecto de monitorización distribuida para entornos de laboratorio, orientado al control de temperatura y humedad mediante sensores y supervisión básica orientada a seguridad.
